assignments.value: New lead received safely. AOS process-lead preview will be called next. No side effects executed.

assignments.name: clientName
assignments.value: ={{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.name || $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.name || "Client" }}

assignments.name: clientPhone
assignments.value: ={{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.phone || $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.phone || "" }}

assignments.name: service
assignments.value: ={{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.category || $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.category || "home-service" }}

assignments.name: city
assignments.value: ={{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.city || $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.city || "" }}

assignments.name: area
assignments.value: ={{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.area || $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.area || "" }}

assignments.name: whatsappMessage
assignments.value: =Hi {{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.name || "Client" }}, thanks for contacting QuickFurno. We are connecting you with verified {{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.category || "home-service" }} vendors near {{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.area || $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.city || "your area" }}. You may receive calls from selected verified vendors shortly.

assignments.name: leadId
assignments.value: ={{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead_id || $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.leadId || "UNKNOWN-LEAD" }}

assignments.name: vendorWhatsAppMessage
assignments.value: =New QuickFurno Lead. Service: {{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.category || "home-service" }}. Area: {{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.area || "" }}, {{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.city || "" }}. Budget: {{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.budget || "" }}. Client: {{ $('QF AOS Events Webhook').item.json.body?.lead?.name || "Preview Client" }}. Phone: Masked / shown only as per admin policy. Reply: 1 - I will contact now, 2 - Not interested, 3 - Already contacted, 4 - Client not reachable. Preview only. No WhatsApp sent.
